data.body: d6bd (hexangular-mystical-banteng) implemented + committed: baseline flags removed, _advance_baselines extracted from deleted baseline_shadow.py, cold-start RECON line + doc + tests, dry-run zero-diff pin test; reconciler dir 1257 passed, lint/typecheck clean. USER REQUESTED rebase on origin/main (had advanced 11 commits): rebased 5-change stack; only conflict was rebar.toml where origin/main added a new [identity] section where d6bd removed [reconciler] flags — resolved keeping BOTH (new [identity] + reconciler retirement comment). Rebased stack lint/typecheck/16-contract-tests green. RE-PUSHED to Gerrit (FFO rebase-and-re-CI): 653/654/655/656 updated + 659=d6bd new. Relying on CI Verified for full-suite check. Now: doc-sweep 5566 (final story, on top).
